extension.description: Utilities for an Amlogic CoreELEC + Android internal dual-boot: sync Bluetooth remotes paired in Android over to CoreELEC (no re-pairing), choose which OS boots by default, and fix the WiFi MAC if CoreELEC shows a wrong/shared default. Generic to Amlogic CoreELEC boxes.
extension.news: v1.0.0 - Initial release: Bluetooth remote sync from Android, default boot OS, WiFi MAC fix.
